svg.text: 40-node Apple Silicon Mac Mini · ≤1,000 internal users · On-premises · Air-gapped capable

g.text: OpenAI-compatible REST · HTTPS/TLS · Any OpenAI SDK
Layer-4 TCP load balancing · Virtual IP failover < 10 s · Health-check every 5 s · 2 dedicated M1 nodes
Token budgets · Context enforcement · Audit log
All pools pull from here on startup
hostmetrics → CPU, RAM, disk, net, swap
drift queue: grain diff → DriftRecord · sbom: CycloneDX ingestion · 5-min sweep
cluster.yml → Orchestration blueprint for M-series metal · Strictly offline / air-gapped target execution
System Roles: otel-mac-agent · salt-minion · salt-master · jenkins-ios-agent · base · hw-exporter · llm-discovery · monitoring-cfg
